instruction: Rewrite the description in clear, professional cybersecurity language.
input: A vulnerability classified as critical has been found in arekk uke. This affects an unknown part of the file lib/uke/finder.rb. The manipulation leads to sql injection. The identifier of the patch is 52fd3b2d0bc16227ef57b7b98a3658bb67c1833f. It is recommended to apply a patch to fix this issue. The identifier VDB-217485 was assigned to this vulnerability.
output: A critical vulnerability has been identified in the arekk uke application, specifically in the file located at lib/uke/finder.rb. This flaw allows SQL injection. The patch for this issue is identified by the hash 52fd3b2d0bc16227ef57b7b98a3658bb67c1833f. Users are advised to apply the patch promptly. The vulnerability is referenced as VDB-217485.
